title: LLOYTRON Universal Home Battery Charger for AA/AAA/C/D / 9V (PP3) NiMh Rechargeable Batteries - Charge Individual Batteries at Once - B1531 - Black
features: UNIVERSAL: The LLOYTRON Universal Battery Charger is compatible with NiMh batteries in sizes AA, AAA, C, D and 9v (PP3). Charge individual batteries at one time (dependent on battery size). The battery charger has been designed so that the user can charge different sized batteries at the same time.

EASY TO OPERATE: Simply plug in to a standard UK mains socket and insert your rechargeable batteries into the appropriate sized compartment. The red light will turn on to indicate that a battery has been inserted and leave to charge for the recommended time. There is no indicator to state when the battery is fully charged.
RECHARGE: Recharge your batteries to their full capacity quickly and safely. The charging rate for AA/AAA/C/D is 1.2v DC 150mA and for 9v (PP3) is DC 35mA.

DURABLE: Many rechargeable batteries can be recharged up to 1000 times, providing long lasting power to your everyday devices again and again. Save money and reduce waste without the need for disposable batteries.
BUILT-IN SAFETY FEATURES: The over charge protection and reverse polarity protection/automatic short circuit protects the battery against current fluctuation for safe operation.
description: The LLOYTRON Universal Battery Charger is compatible with many batteries sizes and will charge individual batteries of AA, AAA, C, D and 9v (PP3) sized batteries at the same time. Both NiMh and NiCd batteries can be charged; save money and reduce waste without the need for disposable batteries. Recharge your batteries to their full capacity quickly and safely. This device has been designed so that the user can charge mixed pairs of different sized batteries at the same time, for your convenience. Simply plug in to a standard UK mains socket and insert your rechargeable batteries into the appropriate sized compartment. The red light will turn on to indicate that a battery has been inserted, and leave to charge for the recommended time. To calculate the charging time the battery capacity must be divided by the charging rate and so is dependent on the batteries you require. The charging rate for AA/AAA/C/D is 1.2v DC 150mA and for 9v (PP3) is DC 35mA. There is no indicator to state when the battery is fully charged. This durable battery charger is long lasting to give power to your family's devices time and again, with many batteries able to recharge up to 1000 times. The safety features such as over charge protection and reverse polarity protection/automatic short circuit protects the battery against current fluctuation, although it is advised not to leave batteries charging for over double the amount of time they require to reach full charge. Batteries not included. Package Includes: 1 x LLOYTRON Universal Battery Charger 1x Instruction Manual
